verses.1: When Jesus saw the crowds, He went up on the mountain and sat down. His disciples came to Him,
verses.2: and He began to teach them, saying:

3.text: “Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
3.speaker: Jesus

4.text: Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
4.speaker: Jesus

5.text: Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth.
5.speaker: Jesus

6.text: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled.
6.speaker: Jesus

7.text: Blessed are the merciful, for they will be shown mercy.
7.speaker: Jesus

8.text: Blessed are the pure in heart, for they will see God.
8.speaker: Jesus

9.text: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called sons of God.
9.speaker: Jesus

10.text: Blessed are those who are persecuted because of righteousness, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
10.speaker: Jesus

11.text: Blessed are you when people insult you, persecute you, and falsely say all kinds of evil against you because of Me.
11.speaker: Jesus

12.text: Rejoice and be glad, because great is your reward in heaven, for in the same way they persecuted the prophets before you.
12.speaker: Jesus

13.text: You are the salt of the earth. But if the salt loses its savor, how can it be made salty again? It is no longer good for anything, except to be thrown out and trampled by men.
13.speaker: Jesus

14.text: You are the light of the world. A city on a hill cannot be hidden.
14.speaker: Jesus

15.text: Neither do people light a lamp and put it under a basket. Instead, they set it on a stand, and it gives light to everyone in the house.
15.speaker: Jesus

16.text: In the same way, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
16.speaker: Jesus

17.text: Do not think that I have come to abolish the Law or the Prophets. I have not come to abolish them, but to fulfill them.
17.speaker: Jesus

18.text: For I tell you truly, until heaven and earth pass away, not a single jot or stroke will disappear from the Law until everything is accomplished.
18.speaker: Jesus

19.text: So then, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do likewise will be called least in the kingdom of heaven; but whoever practices and teaches them will be called great in the kingdom of heaven.
19.speaker: Jesus

20.text: For I tell you that unless your righteousness exceeds that of the scribes and Pharisees, you will never enter the kingdom of heaven.
20.speaker: Jesus

21.text: You have heard that it was said to the ancients, ‘Do not murder, and anyone who murders will be subject to judgment.’
21.speaker: Jesus

22.text: But I tell you that anyone who is angry with his brother will be subject to judgment.
22.speaker: Jesus

23.text: So if you are offering your gift at the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you,
23.speaker: Jesus

24.text: leave your gift there before the altar. First go and be reconciled to your brother; then come and offer your gift.
24.speaker: Jesus

25.text: Reconcile quickly with your adversary, while you are still on the way to court. Otherwise, he may hand you over to the judge, and the judge may hand you over to the officer, and you may be thrown into prison.
25.speaker: Jesus

26.text: Truly I tell you, you will not get out until you have paid the last penny.
26.speaker: Jesus

27.text: You have heard that it was said, ‘Do not commit adultery.’
27.speaker: Jesus

28.text: But I tell you that anyone who looks at a woman to lust after her has already committed adultery with her in his heart.
28.speaker: Jesus

29.text: If your right eye causes you to sin, gouge it out and throw it away. It is better for you to lose one part of your body than for your whole body to be thrown into hell.
29.speaker: Jesus

30.text: And if your right hand causes you to sin, cut it off and throw it away. It is better for you to lose one part of your body than for your whole body to depart into hell.
30.speaker: Jesus

31.text: It has also been said, ‘Whoever divorces his wife must give her a certificate of divorce.’
31.speaker: Jesus

32.text: But I tell you that anyone who divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, brings adultery upon her.
32.speaker: Jesus

33.text: Again, you have heard that it was said to the ancients, ‘Do not break your oath, but fulfill your vows to the Lord.’
33.speaker: Jesus

34.text: But I tell you not to swear at all: either by heaven, for it is God’s throne;
34.speaker: Jesus

35.text: or by the earth, for it is His footstool; or by Jerusalem, for it is the city of the great King.
35.speaker: Jesus

36.text: Nor should you swear by your head, for you cannot make a single hair white or black.
36.speaker: Jesus

37.text: Simply let your ‘Yes’ be ‘Yes,’ and your ‘No,’ ‘No.’ Anything more comes from the evil one.
37.speaker: Jesus

38.text: You have heard that it was said, ‘Eye for eye and tooth for tooth.’
38.speaker: Jesus

39.text: But I tell you not to resist an evil person. If someone slaps you on your right cheek, turn to him the other also;
39.speaker: Jesus

40.text: if someone wants to sue you and take your tunic, let him have your cloak as well;
40.speaker: Jesus

41.text: and if someone forces you to go one mile, go with him two miles.
41.speaker: Jesus

42.text: Give to the one who asks you, and do not turn away from the one who wants to borrow from you.
42.speaker: Jesus

43.text: You have heard that it was said, ‘Love your neighbor and hate your enemy.’
43.speaker: Jesus

44.text: But I tell you, love your enemies, bless those who curse you, do good to those who hate you, and pray for those who persecute you,
44.speaker: Jesus

45.text: that you may be sons of your Father in heaven. He causes His sun to rise on the evil and the good, and sends rain on the righteous and the unrighteous.
45.speaker: Jesus

46.text: If you love those who love you, what reward will you get? Do not even tax collectors do the same?
46.speaker: Jesus

47.text: And if you greet only your brothers, what are you doing more than others? Do not even Gentiles do the same?
47.speaker: Jesus

48.text: Be perfect, therefore, as your heavenly Father is perfect.
48.speaker: Jesus
